items.title: VAIA
items.world: Botanical restaurant / wine room / private dining
items.description: A live landing page for a Lisbon botanical restaurant and wine room — coastal light, warm stone, olive green and the feeling of a long table waiting. Built to make the restaurant feel like a destination before the guest reaches the reservation flow.

items.title: Aya Maison
items.description: A website and mobile app concept for a ritual-based wellness sanctuary, imagined as a digital château. Seasonal rituals, quiet rooms and app paths are woven into one world — built for wellness brands people want to return to.

items.title: Aya Club
items.world: Private members club / women of taste / curated leisure
items.description: A live landing page for a private members club for women — selective, quiet and invitation-only by design. Built around belonging, ritual and discretion, with a membership flow that feels more like being invited than being sold to.

items.title: Toscana Palace
items.description: A live landing page for a boutique Tuscan estate hotel — golden afternoon light, terracotta, cypresses and the slow rhythm of seasonal escapes. Built to make a weekend feel already imagined before the guest reaches the booking flow.

items.title: Aya Journeys
items.description: A travel website and app concept built for emotional journey curation, not search-and-book. Destinations and stories are shaped for travel brands that sell longing, atmosphere and return — not discounts.

items.title: Aya Beauty Studio
items.description: A beauty studio website concept for advanced skincare and treatments — luminous, soft and quietly clinical. Built for beauty brands that need to feel expert and inviting before the first appointment.

items.title: Travel Beautifully
items.description: A boutique travel website concept for curated trips and local experiences — warm, personal and editorial in voice. Made for travel brands that feel closer to a private agent than a booking engine.

items.title: Lina Stretch
items.world: Stretch studio / aerial practice / movement wellness
items.description: A boutique studio website for stretch, mobility and aerial practice — calm, grounded and built around the body. Made for local wellness studios that need a beautiful way to turn atmosphere into bookings.

items.title: Solstice Skincare
items.world: Skincare / sun care / daily product rituals
items.description: A skincare e-commerce and app concept built around daily ritual, coastal warmth and natural light. Made for beauty brands that need to sell products without losing the world those products belong to.

items.title: Lina Moraes
items.world: Fitness coaching / transformation / personal expert brand
items.description: A personal brand website concept for a fitness coach — strong, minimal and confident. Built for experts with a clear system, where programs, proof and booking all move toward trust.
